title: Spear Mace Nerfer
description: Prevents spear and mace DTaps by capping damage so players are always left on 1 heart. Simple, fair, and PvP-friendly.
body:
# 🔱 Spear & Mace Nerfer

**Fair PvP. No More DTaps.**

Spear & Mace Nerfer is a lightweight Minecraft plugin designed to stop unfair one-shot kills caused by spear or mace DTaps. Instead of letting these weapons instantly delete players, this plugin caps their damage so the target is always left at a minimum of 1 heart.

This keeps combat intense, skill-based, and fair—without removing the weapons entirely.

## ✨ Features

- Caps spear and mace damage

- Prevents DTaps / one-shot kills

- Opponents are always left on 1 heart minimum

- Lightweight & performance-friendly

- Perfect for PvP servers, events, and competitive gameplay

- Works seamlessly with Paper

## 🎯 Why use this plugin?

DTaps can ruin PvP balance and frustrate players. This plugin keeps spears and maces powerful but not broken, encouraging follow-up combat instead of instant deaths.
